message.zh: 太棒了！你一次就做对了！🌟
message.en: Amazing! You got it on the first try! 🌟

message.zh: 坚持就是胜利！你做到了！💪
message.en: Persistence pays off! You did it! 💪

message.zh: 用提示也很棒，重要的是你理解了！🎯
message.en: Using hints is great too, what matters is you understood! 🎯

message.zh: 没关系，再试一次！每次尝试都在进步哦～
message.en: No worries, try again! Every attempt is progress~

message.zh: 换个思路试试看？你离答案很近了！
message.en: Try a different approach? You're very close!

message.zh: 叮！灵感来了！你发现了一个新规律！✨
message.en: Ding! Inspiration struck! You found a new pattern! ✨

message.zh: 需要一点小提示吗？点这里看看～
message.en: Need a little hint? Tap here~
